Procedure: 0.6.2 Acquiring domains to support influence operations
0.6.2 Acquiring domains to support influence operations
1.2.8 Posing as fictional person in target region
Indicator: This operation, active since 2022, was characterized by high-quality persona building; fake accounts included detailed information such as relationship statuses, education, and specific professions.
The network attempted to inject narratives into the comment sections of prominent authentic news pages like the BBC and RadioLiberty.
Some of the accounts in this network were designed to reflect the actual Azerbaijani diaspora in Russia, speaking Russian and claiming to live in Moscow.
